name: does not praise or restate detailed member tracking issue
description: Real GitHub issue fixture for a detailed member-authored tracking issue where Pierre should not post praise or restatement.

issue.title: Codify recurring Codex transcript and bugfix findings
issue.author: dcramer
issue.body:
## Summary

Codex transcript review and commit-history analysis surfaced several recurring, mechanically detectable failure patterns that should be codified through existing repo checks.

## Tasks

- [ ] Add an eval command/documentation check.
- [ ] Add an eval harness/schema drift check.
- [ ] Add a changed-spec metadata check.
- [ ] Add ast-grep rules for forbidden runtime singleton/test mutation patterns.
- [ ] Add a production composition-root import boundary check.

## Recommended First Slice

1. Eval command/documentation check.
2. Eval harness/schema drift check.
3. Changed-spec metadata check.
4. Runtime singleton/test mutation ast-grep rules.
5. Production composition-root import boundary check.
